Video.summary: The holdup-proof safe in Gus Lammerson's store proves anything but.
Video.title: The Holdup-Proof Safe

Video.summary: A mine cave-in alters a rivalry between two men over the affections of a woman.
Video.title: The Watch

Video.summary: A reporter probes reports that a general is selling guns to Natives in exchange for their property.
Video.title: The Truth Teller

Video.summary: In Totem, Idaho, Dorsey Bilger has told one tall tale too many.
Video.title: A Sponge Full of Vinegar

Video.summary: The story of Amadeo Giannini and the creation of the Bank of America.
Video.title: The Unshakable Man

Video.summary: A husband and wife catch trouble when they allow an Apache chief's granddaughter to stay with them.
Video.title: Suzie

Video.summary: A town boss makes trouble for a farmer.
Video.title: The Last Shot

Video.summary: A horticulturist heads out West to identify new plants and encounters challenges along the way.
Video.title: The Grass Man

Video.summary: Lawmen Pete Gabriel and Joe Phy were friends, then Kitty Bolton came along.
Video.title: Loss of Faith

Video.summary: The man Kit Carson saved from death in the desert turns out to be his wife's ex-fiance.
Video.title: Stubborn Mule Hill

Video.summary: Unable to come to terms, a U.S. senator and a Supreme Court justice agree to a duel.
Video.title: A Gun Is Not a Gentleman

Image.alt: A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman

Video.summary: Attorney William E. Borah defends a woman charged with murder in Nampa, Idaho.
Video.title: The Lion of Idaho

Video.summary: An outlaw and teamster help miners.
Video.title: The Debt

Video.summary: Crew chief Yank Van Duzen walks off a mining job in protest when the foremen ignore warnings.
Video.title: Grotto of Death

Video.summary: An inventor without enough animals to drive his wagon decides to build a sail to do the job.
Video.title: Thar She Blows

Video.summary: A retiring Arizona ranger chases one last crook.
Video.title: Measure of a Man

Video.summary: Hunting a large, mysterious creature.
Video.title: The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek

Image.alt: The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek

Video.summary: As survivors of the Donner Party recuperate, William Eddy grieves the loss of his wife and children.
Video.title: The Hastings Cut-off

Video.summary: John Wheeler is going to even the odds in a fight between meek Arkie Monson and a gunslinger.
Video.title: The Bigger They Are

Video.summary: A man who claims he can resurrect the dead poses a problem for killer Bill Groat.
Video.title: Miracle at Boot Hill

Video.summary: Widow Lucy Tutaine decides to sue the railroad when her cow is hit by a train.
Video.title: The Train and Lucy Tutaine

Video.summary: A Civil War veteran tries to rid his hometown of terrorists.
Video.title: Coffin for a Coward

Video.summary: The emperor of Brazil finds himself stranded in the countryside and unable to prove his identity.
Video.title: A Kingdom for a Horse

Video.summary: An ex-convict dispenses law from his tent in a mining camp.
Video.title: The Law of the Round Tent

Image.alt: The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent

Video.summary: Lt. Robert Benson becomes torn when the woman he loves asks him for secret government information.
Video.title: Matter of Honor

Video.summary: Jeremy is a crew member on a blackbirding ship that inhumanely captures and enslaves native peoples.
Video.title: Showdown at Kamaaina Flats

Video.summary: Pauline runs a saloon in Casa Grande and has shown she neither needs nor wants a husband.
Video.title: The Wooing of Perilous Pauline

Video.summary: A bear hunter and his daughters nurse an injured Easterner back to health.
Video.title: Peter the Hunter

Video.summary: A former Confederate officer tries to help the family of a soldier killed in battle.
Video.title: Paid in Full

Video.summary: A besieged banker devises a way to get gold.
Video.title: Raid on the San Francisco Mint

Image.alt: Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint

Video.summary: A Navy officer faces down a vigilante mob.
Video.title: The Battle of San Francisco Bay

Image.alt: The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay

Video.summary: A minister's attempts to rebuild a church in Carson City are blocked by a saloon owner.
Video.title: Fighting Sky Pilot

Video.summary: A Native woman plans revenge after her husband is killed by thieves.
Video.title: The Captain Dick Mine

Video.summary: Challenges are faced as a boat on wheels travels across the prairie and through Native country.
Video.title: Dry Water Sailors

Video.summary: Mormon emigrant Jessica Scott loses her baby in unknown territory while traveling to Utah.
Video.title: The Red Shawl

Video.summary: A freight hauler marries a rich girl by mistake and has a week to court her before it is annulled.
Video.title: The Courtship of Carrie Huntington

Video.summary: California's ex-governor stops a war.
Video.title: The Firebrand

Video.summary: A priest claims the marriages in a town are void.
Video.title: The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled

Image.alt: The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled

Video.summary: The mayor of Deadwood comes up with a manufactured hero to lure tourists into his dying town.
Video.title: The Resurrection of Deadwood Dick

Video.summary: Lured by promises of gold, prospectors provide a wounded outlaw with aid and an alibi.
Video.title: The Man Who Didn't Want Gold

Image.alt: The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold

Video.summary: In Apache country, a missionary engages in a philosophic battle with an escaped murderer.
Video.title: A Man Called Abraham

Video.summary: A rivalry over a pretty woman inadvertently causes trouble between cavalrymen and Natives.
Video.title: The Hero of Fort Halleck

Video.summary: A woman finds a family heirloom in the possession of a junk collector who demands payment for it.
Video.title: A Bargain Is for Keeping

Video.summary: A cowboy becomes an expert baker while competing for the daughter of a rancher.
Video.title: Crullers at Sundown!

Video.summary: A sheriff pursues deadly gunslinger Sam Bolt and finds an unlikely ally in one of Bolt's partners.
Video.title: Brute Angel

Video.summary: Prospector Jim Otis is taken hostage by robbers after he stumbles onto their loot.
Video.title: Solid Foundation
